title: Gluten-free-friendly Argentinian Semolina Stir-fry
description: A herbal and dense crowd-pleaser from Argentina featuring gluten-free semolina that is perfectly cooked through a simmering process.

ingredients.name: 1 cup gluten-free semolina
ingredients.notes: Choose a brand that is certified gluten-free.

instructions: In a large skillet or wok, heat some olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced semolina and cook until it turns golden brown, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Add garlic and red bell pepper to the skillet. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes, allowing the vegetables to soften slightly.
Add the finely chopped yellow onion into the pan and continue cooking until all ingredients are well combined and slightly softened.
Season with a pinch of salt and black pepper to taste.
